title: Bottom Navigation and Tabs
description: Implementing bottom navigation bars and tab bars.

slides.title: BottomNavigationBar and TabBar 📱
slides.content:
# Tab Navigation

Flutter provides two common tab patterns:
* `BottomNavigationBar` – for bottom tabs.
* `TabBar` + `TabBarView` – for top tabs (usually with AppBar).

Both require managing the current index and displaying the corresponding content.

quizData.question: Which widget is used to display the content of the currently selected tab in a TabBar?
quizData.explanation: TabBarView works with TabController to show the current tab's content.

slides.title: BottomNavigationBar Example
Pro Tip 🚀
slides.content:
## Use IndexedStack for performance

If your tab content is expensive to build, use `IndexedStack` to keep them alive instead of switching with conditionals.
